subject: URGENT: Update Your Aadhaar Mobile Number — UIDAI Notice
body_text:
Dear Aadhaar Holder,

As per UIDAI directive, you must update your registered mobile number by December 31, 2024, or your Aadhaar will be deactivated.

Click here to update: http://uidai-aadhaar-update.xyz/verify

You will need your 12-digit Aadhaar number and OTP.

UIDAI Helpdesk
